reference: Hello, I impacted a soccer goalpost with my shin yesterday. There is a very dark bruise at the impact zone, and the whole surrounding area is completely numb. If I do not limp, I experience excruciating pain radiating throughout my leg from the impact area. Should I get an X-ray, or is it likely to be soft tissue damage?
text: Hello, I impacted a soccer goalkeeper with my shin yesterday. There is a very dark bruise on the leg, and the whole surrounding area is completely numb. If I do not limp, I experience excruciating pain radiating throughout my leg from the impact area. Should I get an X-ray, or is it likely to be soft tissue damage?
